**Saturday, October 3rd, 2015**

This week Senator Rand Paul finished the quarter strong, reporting $2.5 million dollars raised. Paul has the money and the momentum for the long haul, but he can't win with money alone. We must have grassroots supporters like you on the ground. Click [here](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30765350:svlS69mNg:m:1:879035888:E70E6860EA4DB0A9021C4E9C2BBAAAF1:r) to volunteer for the campaign.

Rand also rolled out endorsements this week, from dozens of current and former state representatives, senators, and grassroots leaders from crucial caucus states like Iowa, New Hampshire, Maine, Washington, and Utah. You can view some of the endorsements [here](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30765351:svlS69mNg:m:1:879035888:E70E6860EA4DB0A9021C4E9C2BBAAAF1:r). Stay tuned for updates next week!

Doug Stafford
Chief Strategist
Rand Paul for President

## News of the Week
---
| | |
### Caucus State Leaders Endorse Rand Paul for President
Rand Paul for President today announced several major endorsements from caucus state leaders in Nevada, Minnesota, Kansas and Utah, demonstrating that Sen. Paul's political organization is leaps and bounds ahead of all other Republican campaigns. These elected officials join Rand Paul for President Caucus state leaders Congressman Cynthia Lummis, Wyoming; State Sen. Owen Hill and Former State Sen. Scott Renfroe, Colorado; and State Sen. Eric Brakey, Maine. These leaders will play a pivotal role in winning the caucuses and put Sen. Paul one step closer towards the 2016 Republican nomination.

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30765352:svlS69mNg:m:1:879035888:E70E6860EA4DB0A9021C4E9C2BBAAAF1:r)
---
|
### Rand Paul: Boehner's Successor Should Be Someone Who Was Elected In Past Six Years
Sen. Rand Paul (R-KY), a 2016 GOP presidential candidate, tells Breitbart News that the replacement for departing House Speaker Rep. John Boehner (R-OH) must be someone who has served less than three terms in the House. That means that person would have been elected in the past six years. "I would suggest someone who's been elected less than three times," Paul said when asked who should replace Boehner.

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30765353:svlS69mNg:m:1:879035888:E70E6860EA4DB0A9021C4E9C2BBAAAF1:r)
---
|
### Letter: Rand Paul is Best of Republican Field
There are a ton of Republicans running for president right now. And Rand Paul reminded us in the recent debate that "there are 14 candidates willing to go back to Iraq." That Rand Paul is the only one not in a hurry to spend American dollars and American lives revisiting the biggest mistake in the last 15 years gives me hope and despair. It saddens me that he is the only one hesitant to get involved in more foreign conflicts, but I am grateful that at least he is there. I have always respected Dr. Paul's fight to uphold the Constitution, but until now I didn't understand that for him, the Constitution doesn't do any good for American sons and daughters that have already died fighting someone else's war.

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30765354:svlS69mNg:m:1:879035888:E70E6860EA4DB0A9021C4E9C2BBAAAF1:r)

### Greg Happel
#### Iowa
Greg Happel is a Senior Engineer at Rockwell Collins in Cedar Rapids, Iowa. He spearheaded efforts to recruit his family and friends to stand with Rand through Voter Neighbor, a computer program that lets supporters easily send personalized postcards on behalf of the campaign. Greg has been involved in politics since the 3rd grade, when he canvassed his neighborhood to oppose Tom Harkin's first Senate run. Greg recognizes that Rand is the best candidate to restore the Constitution.

Peter -

On Monday I will officially file my paperwork so I can appear on the ballot in Washington, D.C.

The bulk of that paperwork is a check for $12,500.

**Since you live in or near the Washington Metro area, I'd like to ask for your help.**

If you make a small donation now to help us get on the ballot, we will include your name with our official filing.

**[Will you make a donation now -- and be part of history?](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/30770028:WapEA9mgN:m:1:876315805:5D0BA76F609FBF80BEB326BBE1CEF53A:r)**

From the very beginning, this has been a grassroots campaign funded by everyday, hardworking Americans. That's exactly how it should be.

**[Monday's filing is an important step for our campaign, and I hope you will help out.](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/30770028:WapEA9mgN:m:1:876315805:5D0BA76F609FBF80BEB326BBE1CEF53A:r)**

Thank you for your support.
Sincerely,

Ben Carson

| | When I’m out campaigning in Iowa, the topic of illegal immigration seems to come up every day. I’ve got a simple answer: we need to secure the border, period. It’s not politics – it’s a matter of national security.

I’m the son of legal immigrants to this country. My parents came to the United States to be Americans. They wanted me and my brother to be Americans.

**That’s why I know immigration without assimilation isn’t immigration at all. It’s an invasion.**

As you might imagine, Hillary Clinton doesn’t like when I say that very much.

That’s why she sent her top surrogate, Congressman Joaquin Castro of Texas, out to attack me.

But I’m not scared of Hillary Clinton, Joaquin Castro, or anyone else. They won’t silence me or make me change my conservative beliefs.

I want to know when it became “politically incorrect” to say that immigrants who come to this country should want to be Americans, learn English, roll up their sleeves, and get to work.

name: Team Van Hollen
subject: Did you see Chris on MSNBC demanding urgent action?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
Friend -- This week we witnessed another mass shooting -- adding to the daily toll from gun violence in our neighborhoods in Maryland and throughout the country. As Chris said on MSNBC this week, the death toll is tragic, but Congress's refusal to act is sickening. [_**Take a minute to watch Chris 's interview:**_](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91fd1/70cdc2ba/47a9fcb7/3963bd5/1647043212/VEsH/ "https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=E6py10s-Ksc&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+Take+a+minute+to+watch+Chrisrsquos+inter&utm_campaign=em100215&source=em100215") [_****_](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91fd1/70cdc2ba/47a9fcb7/3963be7/1647043212/VEsE/ "https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=E6py10s-Ksc&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2&utm_campaign=em100215&source=em100215") There are over 90 gun safety bills sitting in Congress that are being blocked by Republicans who kowtow to the NRA and the gun lobby. The cost of inaction for gun violence prevention is simply too high. That's why Chris is urging Speaker Boehner to do what is right and let Congress vote on common sense laws to prevent more of these senseless tragedies. The evidence is crystal clear: common sense laws, like the "permit to purchase" measures passed in Connecticut, do save lives. Maryland has also passed similar legislation, and Chris has introduced the Handgun Purchaser Licensing Act to incentivize other states to adopt these life saving laws. But laws like these will never happen if Congress doesn't act. Help us put pressure on Congress. [_**Click here to share Chris 's interview and help spread the call for Speaker Boehner to let Congress vote to end the violence.**_](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91fd1/70cdc2ba/47a9fcb7/3963bfd/1647043212/VEsF/ "https://secure.vanhollen.org/page/share/chris-on-msnbc?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=3+-+Click+here+to+share+Chrisrsquos+intervie&utm_campaign=em100215&source=em100215") Thanks, Team Van Hollen
| Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
